---
title: "Week 14"
subtitle: "Technology and Politics"
editor: visual
---

## Readings

📖 John Judis, [*The Politics of Our Time*](https://www-jstor-org.proxygw.wrlc.org/stable/j.ctv2dzzqsn)

## Slides

🖥️ [AI and worker adaptability](/slides/lecture-14.1.html)

🖥️ [AI and automation](/slides/lecture-11.1.html)

🖥️ [The populist backlash](/slides/lecture-13.1.html)

<br><br>

::: {style="font-size: 0.875em;"}
Back to [course schedule](/ "Course schedule") ⏎
:::
